case_title: BARBARA ANN BERWICK VS. LINDA E. TEJERA ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $150.00) SERVED FEB-04-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADO, DENILO ENRIQUE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-28-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF BARBARA ANN BERWICK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS LINDA TEJERA AND DENILO DELGADO ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $150.00) SERVED FEB-04-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TEJERA, LINDA E.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERWICK, BARBARA ANN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TEJERA, LINDA E. DELGADO, DENILO ENRIQUE UTILITY EXPENSES MIGHT BE DUE IN THE AMOUNT OF $170.00; ALL OTHER PLAINTIFF CLAIMED EXPENSES ARE UNREASONABLY CHARGED TO DEFENDANTS WHO HAVE PLACED WITH PLAINTIFF SECURITY IN THE AMOUNT OF $1600.00 AND POSSIBLY AS MUCH AS $3200.00 OR MORE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERWICK, BARBARA ANN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,591.74 FILED BY BERWICK, BARBARA ANN AS TO DEFENDANT TEJERA, LINDA E. DELGADO, DENILO ENRIQUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO LINDA E. TEJERA ON 3/29/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDERJ-ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT: [X] THE REQUEST IS DENIED
